info.title: Microsoft Defender for Cloud
info.description: API spec for Microsoft.Security (Microsoft Defender for Cloud) resource provider

get.description: Get security assessments on all your scanned resources inside a scope

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

get.description: Get a security assessment on your scanned resource

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

parameters.name: assessmentName
parameters.description: The Assessment Key - Unique key for the assessment type

values.name: links
values.description: All links associated with an assessment

put.description: Create a security assessment on your resource. An assessment metadata that describes this assessment must be predefined with the same name before inserting the assessment result

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

parameters.name: assessmentName
parameters.description: The Assessment Key - Unique key for the assessment type

parameters.name: assessment
parameters.description: Calculated assessment on a pre-defined assessment metadata

delete.description: Delete a security assessment on your resource. An assessment metadata that describes this assessment must be predefined with the same name before inserting the assessment result

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

parameters.name: assessmentName
parameters.description: The Assessment Key - Unique key for the assessment type

get.description: Get metadata information on all assessment types
Get metadata information on an assessment type

parameters.name: assessmentMetadataName
parameters.description: The Assessment Key - Unique key for the assessment type

get.description: Get metadata information on all assessment types in a specific subscription
Get metadata information on an assessment type in a specific subscription

parameters.name: assessmentMetadataName
parameters.description: The Assessment Key - Unique key for the assessment type

put.description: Create metadata information on an assessment type in a specific subscription

parameters.name: assessmentMetadataName
parameters.description: The Assessment Key - Unique key for the assessment type

delete.description: Delete metadata information on an assessment type in a specific subscription, will cause the deletion of all the assessments of that type in that subscription

parameters.name: assessmentMetadataName
parameters.description: The Assessment Key - Unique key for the assessment type

azurePortalUri.description: Link to assessment in Azure Portal

code.description: Programmatic code for the status of the assessment

cause.description: Programmatic code for the cause of the assessment status

description.description: Human readable description of the assessment status

AssessmentStatusCode.description: Programmatic code for the status of the assessment

values.name: Unhealthy
values.description: The resource has a security issue that needs to be addressed

values.name: NotApplicable
values.description: Assessment for this resource did not happen

firstEvaluationDate.description: The time that the assessment was created and first evaluated. Returned as UTC time in ISO 8601 format

statusChangeDate.description: The time that the status of the assessment last changed. Returned as UTC time in ISO 8601 format

AssessmentType.description: BuiltIn if the assessment based on built-in Azure Policy definition, Custom if the assessment based on custom Azure Policy definition

values.name: BuiltIn
values.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud managed assessments

values.name: CustomPolicy
values.description: User defined policies that are automatically ingested from Azure Policy to Microsoft Defender for Cloud

values.name: CustomerManaged
values.description: User assessments pushed directly by the user or other third party to Microsoft Defender for Cloud

values.name: BuiltInPolicy
values.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud managed policies

values.name: VerifiedPartner
values.description: Third party assessments that are verified by Microsoft Defender for Cloud

values.name: ManualBuiltInPolicy
values.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud managed policies that are manually created by the user

values.name: ManualBuiltIn
values.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud managed assessments that are manually created by the user

values.name: ManualCustomPolicy
values.description: User defined policies that are manually created by the user

values.name: DynamicBuiltIn
values.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud managed assessments that are dynamically created by the system

AzureResourceDetails.description: Details of the Azure resource that was assessed

id.description: Azure resource Id of the assessed resource

Categories.description: The categories of resource that is at risk when the assessment is unhealthy

CloudError.description: Common error response for all Azure Resource Manager APIs to return error details for failed operations. (This also follows the OData error response format.).

ErrorAdditionalInfo.description: The resource management error additional info.

ImplementationEffort.description: The implementation effort required to remediate this assessment

OnPremiseResourceDetails.description: Details of the On Premise resource that was assessed

workspaceId.description: Azure resource Id of the workspace the machine is attached to

vmuuid.description: The unique Id of the machine

sourceComputerId.description: The oms agent Id installed on the machine

OnPremiseSqlResourceDetails.description: Details of the On Premise Sql resource that was assessed

serverName.description: The Sql server name installed on the machine

databaseName.description: The Sql database name installed on the machine

ResourceDetails.description: Details of the resource that was assessed

source.description: The platform where the assessed resource resides

SecurityAssessmentList.description: Page of a security assessments list

properties.description: Describes properties of an assessment metadata.

SecurityAssessmentMetadataPartnerData.description: Describes the partner that created the assessment

partnerName.description: Name of the company of the partner

productName.description: Name of the product of the partner that created the assessment

secret.description: Secret to authenticate the partner and verify it created the assessment - write only

SecurityAssessmentMetadataProperties.description: Describes properties of an assessment metadata.

displayName.description: User friendly display name of the assessment

policyDefinitionId.description: Azure resource ID of the policy definition that turns this assessment calculation on

description.description: Human readable description of the assessment

remediationDescription.description: Human readable description of what you should do to mitigate this security issue

severity.description: The severity level of the assessment

userImpact.description: The user impact of the assessment

implementationEffort.description: The implementation effort required to remediate this assessment

preview.description: True if this assessment is in preview release status

assessmentType.description: BuiltIn if the assessment based on built-in Azure Policy definition, Custom if the assessment based on custom Azure Policy definition

partnerData.description: Describes the partner that created the assessment

SecurityAssessmentMetadataPropertiesResp.description: Describes properties of an assessment metadata response.

properties.description: Describes properties of an assessment metadata response.

partnerName.description: Name of the company of the partner

secret.description: secret to authenticate the partner - write only

resourceDetails.description: Details of the resource that was assessed

displayName.description: User friendly display name of the assessment

metadata.description: Describes properties of an assessment metadata.

riskFactors.description: The factors of the risk adding base factor

attackPathsReferences.description: The attack paths references of the risk

isContextualRisk.description: Indicates if the risk is contextual or static

SecurityAssessmentResponse.description: Security assessment on a resource - response format

Severity.description: The severity level of the assessment

Source.description: The platform where the assessed resource resides

values.name: OnPremise
values.description: Resource in an on premise machine connected to Azure cloud

values.name: OnPremiseSql
values.description: SQL Resource in an on premise machine connected to Azure cloud

UserImpact.description: The user impact of the assessment
